title: Grilled Australian Pork Belly Skewers
description: Tender and juicy pork belly skewers marinated in a mixture of soy sauce, brown sugar, and spices, then grilled to perfection.
instructions: Cut the pork belly into 1-inch cubes.
In a large bowl, whisk together brown sugar, soy sauce, garlic, ginger, black pepper, and salt.
Add the pork cubes to the marinade and mix well.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a grill to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated pork cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 5-7 minutes per side, or until the pork is cooked through.
Serve hot with roasted red pepper slices on top.
